summary: Iteration 47 - Engagement Loop Phase testing complete. Fixed critical backend bug: 'streak' variable undefined in /api/orientation/daily-answer endpoint. After fix, daily-answer now returns impact_score, streak, niche_info, identity_link correctly. All 6 engagement loop features tested. EntryLayer shows world direction + user force + suggested action. GlobalFieldDashboard shows live indicator with 'חי' text and animated action counter. QuickDecisionButton (FAB) opens panel with 4 direction buttons and shows reward. ClosingLayer tension/return-hook visible only when user has actions (total_actions > 0). All 6 tabs work. Profile and Community regression pass.

fixed.issue: NameError: 'streak' variable was not defined in submit_daily_answer function
fixed.fix: Added streak calculation logic at line 3570-3590 in server.py

critical_code_review_comments: Backend bug fixed: streak variable was referenced but not defined in submit_daily_answer - now calculates streak from answered questions
EntryLayer correctly fetches field-dashboard and compass-ai APIs to show dynamic content
QuickDecisionButton dispatches 'globe-field-pulse' custom event as expected
ClosingLayer tension/return-hook correctly conditional on total_actions > 0
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for all new components
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed streak variable undefined bug in submit_daily_answer (lines 3570-3590)
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo users (demo_0 etc.) and created test_engagement_user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 47 adds 6 engagement loop tightenings: (1) EntryLayer dynamic hook - data-testid='entry-layer', 'entry-world-direction', 'entry-suggested-action', 'entry-cta'. (2) QuickDecisionButton FAB - data-testid='quick-action-fab', 'quick-action-panel', 'quick-dir-{direction}', 'quick-action-reward'. (3) GlobalFieldDashboard - data-testid='global-field-dashboard', 'field-action-count', shows 'חי' live indicator. (4) DailyOrientationQuestion reward - data-testid='impact-score-reward', 'niche-progress-reward', 'identity-growth-link'. (5) ClosingLayer tension/return-hook - data-testid='closing-layer', 'closing-tension', 'closing-return-hook' - only visible when user has actions. (6) FieldGlobeSection ambient pulses - data-testid='field-heartbeat'.

backend_api_tests.field_dashboard: PASS - returns dominant_direction, total_actions_today, direction_counts, active_regions
backend_api_tests.compass_ai: PASS - returns user force and suggested action
backend_api_tests.daily_answer_reward: PASS - returns impact_score, streak, niche_info, identity_link (after fix)

frontend_ui_tests.entry_layer_world_direction: PASS - data-testid='entry-world-direction' shows current field direction
frontend_ui_tests.live_indicator: PASS - 'חי' text visible in dashboard header
frontend_ui_tests.quick_action_panel: PASS - data-testid='quick-action-panel' opens with 4 direction buttons
frontend_ui_tests.quick_action_reward: PASS - data-testid='quick-action-reward' shows +impact score and profile link

regression_tests.community_circle_detail: PASS - clicking circle shows member feed

bug_rca.issue: POST /api/orientation/daily-answer/{user_id} returning 500 error with 'name 'streak' is not defined'
bug_rca.root_cause: In server.py submit_daily_answer function (line 3552-3686), the variables 'streak' were used in the return statement (lines 3675, 3677) but never calculated/defined within the function scope. The streak calculation logic existed in get_daily_question function but was not duplicated to submit_daily_answer.
reproduction_steps: 2. Submit answer: POST /api/orientation/daily-answer/{user_id} with {question_id, action_taken: true}
3. Server returns 500 error: 'name 'streak' is not defined'
bug_rca.fix_applied: Added streak calculation logic (lines 3570-3590) that queries daily_questions for answered questions and calculates consecutive days streak, mirroring the logic from get_daily_question function
bug_rca.verification: After fix, POST /api/orientation/daily-answer returns success with impact_score, streak, niche_info, identity_link
